# ToolSchemas.SchemaDialect method

Returns the dialect governing a schema document: the explicit `$schema` keyword when present (and a string), otherwise the default 2020-12 dialect. (§16.4(1), R-16.4-a, R-16.4-b)

```csharp
public static string SchemaDialect(JsonObject schema)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| schema | The schema document. |

## Return Value

The governing dialect URI.
